function: () => { window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 100, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale', heat: 'HEATING' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); r({ classes: panel.className, readout: document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout').textContent, label: document.getElementById('draw-strength-label').textContent }); }, 2000)); }
